briefdescription.para: Allow running mixed contents or not.

parameterdescription.para: if true, allow to run mixed contents, otherwise not allow

briefdescription.para: Enable the spatial navigation or not.

parameterdescription.para: if true, use spatial navigation, otherwise to disable

simplesect.para: defaut font size.

parameterdescription.para: a new default font size to set
if true, to enable the web security otherwise to disable
if true, to enable cache builder otherwise to disable
if true, to use scrollbar thumb focus notifications otherwise to unused
if true, to enable do not track otherwise to disable

briefdescription.para: Allow/Disallow file access from external url.

parameterdescription.para: if true, to allow file access from external url otherwise to disallow

briefdescription.para: Check if javascript is enabled or not.

simplesect.para: true if enabled, false if disabled.

parameterdescription.para: if true, to enable javascript otherwise to disable

briefdescription.para: Check if auto fitting is enabled or not.

simplesect.para: true if enabled, false if disabled.

parameterdescription.para: if true, to enable auto fitting otherwise to disable

briefdescription.para: Check if plugins are enabled or not.

simplesect.para: true if enabled, false if disabled.

parameterdescription.para: if true, to enable plugins otherwise to disable

briefdescription.para: Check if private browsing is enabled or not.

simplesect.para: true if enabled, false if disabled.

parameterdescription.para: if true, to enable private browsing otherwise to disable

briefdescription.para: Check if link magnifier is enabled or not.

simplesect.para: true if enabled, false if disabled.

parameterdescription.para: if true, to enable link magnifier otherwise to disable

briefdescription.para: Check if uses keypad without user action is used or not.

simplesect.para: true if used, false if unused.

parameterdescription.para: if true, to use keypad without user action otherwise to unused

briefdescription.para: Check if autofill password form is enabled or not.

simplesect.para: true if enabled, false if disabled.

parameterdescription.para: if true, to enable autofill_password_form otherwise to disable

briefdescription.para: check if form candidate data is enabled or not.

simplesect.para: true if enabled, false is disabled.

parameterdescription.para: if true, to enable form candidate data otherwise to disable

briefdescription.para: check if text selection is enabled or not.

simplesect.para: true if enabled, false is disabled.

parameterdescription.para: if true, to enable text selection otherwise to disable

briefdescription.para: check if text autosizing is enabled or not.

simplesect.para: true if enabled, false is disabled.

parameterdescription.para: if true, to enable text autosizing otherwise to disable

briefdescription.para: check if arrow scroll is enabled or not.

simplesect.para: true if enabled, false is disabled.

parameterdescription.para: if true, to enable arrow scroll otherwise to disable

briefdescription.para: check if clipboard is enabled or not.

simplesect.para: true if enabled, false is disabled.

parameterdescription.para: if true, to enable clipboard otherwise to disable

briefdescription.para: check if ime panel is enabled or not.

simplesect.para: true if enabled, false is disabled.

parameterdescription.para: if true, to enable ime panel otherwise to disable

briefdescription.para: Allow if the scripts can open new windows.

parameterdescription.para: if true, the scripts can open new windows, otherwise not

briefdescription.para: Check if images are loaded automatically or not.

simplesect.para: true if enabled, false if disabled.

parameterdescription.para: if true, to load images automatically, otherwise not

simplesect.para: defaut encoding name.

parameterdescription.para: a default encoding name to set

detaileddescription.para: By default, the viewport meta tag is enabled on mobile and wearable, but it is disabled on TV.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable the viewport meta tag false to disable

simplesect.para: true on success or false on failure

parameterdescription.para: to force zoom

simplesect.para: true on success or false on failure
true if enable force zoom or false.

briefdescription.para: Requests setting use of text zoom.

parameterdescription.para: to text zoom.

simplesect.para: true on success or false on failure

briefdescription.para: Returns whether text zoom is enabled or not.

simplesect.para: true if enable text zoom or false.

briefdescription.para: Requests enables/disables to the specific extra feature.

parameterdescription.para: feature name
true to enable the specific extra feature false to disable

briefdescription.para: Returns enable/disable to the specific extra feature.

parameterdescription.para: feature name

simplesect.para: true on enable or false on disable

parameterdescription.para: IME_STYLE_FULL full IME style IME_STYLE_FLOATING floating IME style IME_STYLE_DYNAMIC dynamic IME style

simplesect.para: IME_STYLE_FULL full IME style IME_STYLE_FLOATING floating IME style IME_STYLE_DYNAMIC dynamic IME style

parameterdescription.para: default device ID
if true, to enable Drag&Drop otherwise to disable

briefdescription.para: A class WebEngineSettings for settings of web engine.
